items.title: American Express Platinum Refresh Seen Offering Growth Potential Despite Customer Fatigue: Analyst
items.description: American Express Company's (NYSE:AXP) refreshed Platinum card has drawn mixed reactions from existing customers but appears promising in attracting new ones, according to a survey of 250 affluent consumers. Truist Securities analyst Brian Foran stated that the consumer poll revealed that 27% of current Platinum holders were optimistic about the changes, 35% were neutral, and 25% were negative.
